howItWorks.title: A mobile-first system built for execution
howItWorks.subtitle: Short, focused steps for busy lives: set a goal, map your momentum, receive precision guidance, and move every day.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Career, wealth, relationship, or wellbeing. Start with one clear outcome so the system can optimize for real movement.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See where your habits, karmic patterns, and timing windows are helping or blocking your progress.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your dynamic profile blends chart intelligence, behavior signals, and life context to generate highly personalized next actions.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Get concise, actionable prompts you can complete in minutes from your phone, then track your transformation over time.

trustSection.title: Trust earned through rigor
trustSection.subtitle: Premium experience, disciplined AI systems, and privacy-first architecture designed for long-term personal transformation.
trustSection.usersText: People use iBhakt to move key life goals forward with consistency, not to consume generic spiritual content.
trustSection.aiText: Our guidance models are trained on 40,000+ personas and tuned with Vedic logic for context-rich recommendations.
trustSection.secureText: Sensitive birth and intent data is protected with strict controls so your spiritual growth remains personal and secure.
trustSection.wisdomText: Ancient frameworks are translated into clear, action-oriented guidance inside a refined, mobile-first interface.

landingAi.title: Your chart becomes the brain of your manifestation coach
landingAi.subtitle: iBhakt reads houses, lords, dasha windows, and lunar rhythm—then translates them into plain-language rituals, prompts, and next steps you can use today.
landingAi.bullet1: Context-aware AI that respects classical chart structure
landingAi.bullet2: Manifestation flows tuned to timing—not generic affirmations
landingAi.bullet3: Karma ledger + insights so progress feels measurable
landingAi.cardBody: Create a free account to sync your chart, save manifestations, and unlock deeper AI guidance as you grow.
landingAi.cardFoot: No credit card to browse core flows. Upgrade only when you want more depth.

form.title: Add Karma Action
form.description: Describe an action you performed today. Our AI will classify it and update your karma score.
form.actionTextPlaceholder: e.g., Helped a friend move today, Donated to charity, Told a lie...
form.actionTextHelp: Describe what you did in detail. Be honest and specific.
form.categoryHelp: Optional: Specify a category to help with classification.
form.intensityHelp: How significant was this action? (1 = minor, 10 = major impact)

success.addedDesc: Your action has been classified and your karma score has been updated.

errors.actionRequiredDesc: Please describe the action you performed.
errors.notAuthenticated: Please login to add karma actions

founder.intro: Prachi Surve and Rahul Gudadhe built iBhakt to bridge authentic Vedic insight and thoughtful technology—so seekers get depth, dignity, and practical guidance in one place.

prachi.name: Prachi Surve
prachi.bio: Shapes product vision and user trust—ensuring classical wisdom shows up clearly and respectfully in every experience.

rahul.name: Rahul Gudadhe
rahul.bio: Leads technical direction and responsible AI—keeping the platform rigorous, transparent, and aligned with ethical use.

founder.whyBody: Many people feel spiritual tools are either frozen in the past or reduced to shallow apps. We wanted a space where Kundli logic, manifestation practice, and karmic reflection could exist in one deliberate flow—powered by AI that respects scripture-informed reasoning and invites ethical, grounded use.
founder.visionTitle: Vision of a spiritual AI future
founder.visionBody: We imagine AI as a humble assistant to human wisdom: surfacing timing, patterns, and self-awareness while you stay in the driver’s seat. The long-term vision is a companion that helps you align intention with action, honor your lineage, and grow with transparency—never with fear, hype, or dependency.
